Task.title: Task
Task.description: A single to-do task item within personal project spaces.

completed.description: Indicates whether the task is checked off.

priority.description: The urgency tier of this task.

project.description: The custom workspace or project name classification.

dueDate.description: The active calendar timeline target deadline.

/users/{userId}/tasks/{taskId}.description: Collection storing task items allocated strictly of individual authenticated users.
